## User needs

* As a person who is blind, I need to know if an image is decorative or informative so that I can decide if it's relevant to me. 
* As a user with low vision, I need to know if an image is decorative or informative so that I can decide if it's relevant to me. 
* As a content author, I need to know when a tool I'm using has inserted automatically generated alternative text for an image in my content.
* As a person with a cognitive or memory disability, I need to know if an image is decorative or informative so that I can decide if it's relevant to me.
* As a person who is blind, I need access to the complex information conveyed visually by an image.
* As a person who is blind, I need an understandable description of the information or functionality conveyed by an image.
* [TODO] As a person who is blind, I need access to the non-visual content in an image such as alternative text, metadata, and the time a photograph was taken.
* As a person who is blind or has low vision, I need access to the information conveyed by images of text.
* As a person who is blind or has low vision, I need access to any text in an image that conveys important information.
* As a person who is blind or has low vision, I need to know when the styling or presentation of text conveys important meaning.
* As a person who is blind or has low vision, I need to understand how an image relates to the surrounding context. 
* As a person who is blind or has low vision, I need to understand the implied meaning or purpose an image conveys when it's used in a particular context. 
* [TODO] As a user, I want image descriptions to match the surrounding content.
* As a person who is blind or has low vision, I need image descriptions to match the tone and structure of the surrounding content.
* As a person who relies on image descriptions, I need descriptions to convey the same information and meaning that other users obtain from viewing these images.
* [TODO] As a user, I need to personalize text description for example to alter content that may otherwise be disturbing, harmful or offensive.  Summarizations. Translations. Simplification.
* [TODO] As a  person who is blind, I need to know if the image is a photograph so that I can ask somebody to describe any details I'm interested in about the photo.
* [TODO] I need multiple ways/formats to access content.
* [TODO] I need to understand the message being conveyed in a data visualization.
* As a person who is blind or has low vision, I need to be able to find information in a data visualization so that I can complete a task or answer a question.
* As a person with a cognitive disability, I need the information presented in an interactive data visualization to be simplified.
* As a person with low vision, I need to be able to distinguish important information within data-graphics such as charts, maps, and graphs.
